column1: Hey Alex, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
sup were you still looking for help from us with spring break?
Cool I got you! which destination were you lookin to book
yea Cancun is fire fs. Punta Cana is popular too thats where I'll be
how many ppl in your group so far?
yea thats solid! you all from the same school?
oh fire yea we got a pretty good group from there rollin with us
y'all def know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
Lol for sure! word I'll send what we have now at the moment and we'll go from there. pricing does change quickly with so many ppl booking rn just a heads up
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
just sent that over lmk if you got it
Do we all have to fly out of the same airport if we do flights through you
Also it's optional to do flights through spring u right
Honestly you save a lot of money doing flight separately on your own
I only recommend it if you don't mind spending a little more and want the convenience of everything being done in one shot
You'll probably save a booth 150-200 bucks getting it on your own
heyy Alexandra whats up, how we feelin about those options so far?
Hey! Sorry, talking it over with my friends today. Thanks for checking in!!
I'll get back to you soon
Is there somewhere I can go to find reviews on your agency?? I tried looking them up and couldn't find much and tik tok wasn't helpful either lol
yea! how'd you find us originally?
my friend had told me about student city so I looked into them but then also just searched online for other agencies similar
gotcha. yea we have tons of reviews on google from past years
you can google spring break u
hey checkin in, we narrow down on which option we wanna roll with?
Hi, for this 4 night grand oasis, what does the price 646 mean? $646 for one night in that room and so each person would pay 1/4 of that since 4 person room?
means $646 per person, for the entire stay. that looks like 5 nights pricing btw
Ok awesome. Which Krystal hotel is it in Cancun .. Krystal Grand Cancun, Crystal Urban Cancun and Beach Club, or Hotel Kyrstal. It seems like there are multiple

Also, for what is included, it has a start after the food and drinks at the hotel. What does this mean? Im assuming it means not actually all food and drinks because I know that many times people stay at all inclusives and are surprised to find out many things are not actually included. Can you give me more details on this?
And where do I see pricing for add ons like the party package
It's the Krystal Hotel. Not the grand
The star just means not the top shelf liquor. Those usually require a certain wristband or membership. Everything else is free game however many times you want

Party package I can email to you cause it's a lot to breakdown. But in summary it comes with express entry, cover charge, and open bar at our off resort nightclub hosted nights at venues like D'Cave, Mandala, Mandala Beach Club, Rakata, Vaquita, and Coco Bongo
Ok awesome can you send me that email. Also, how many more college students would you say on average stay at the grand oasis vs the Krystal
Ive heard lots about the grand oasis and less ab Krystal so just wondering if you think we would be missing out on going to Krystal
Krystal is a lot smaller of a resort so it's a little hard to compare. The Grand O is literally all college students. Krystal you'll get a small mix
Ok. How much are Ubers/transportation to the area w all the bars? Because I know Krystal is right next to all the bars (DCave, Coco Bongo, Mándala, La Vaquita, Resort club)
its a $1 bus ride 5 miles down to road from Grand O to the party center. and yea Krystal is literally next door to it all. 3 min walk
Loved “its a $1 bus ride 5 miles down to road from Grand O to the party center. and yea Krystal is literally next door to it all. 3 min walk”
would u mind sending me the pricing and specifics for the add ons and the party package. My friends and I are planning to book tmrw or the next day
Yea I got you I'll add it to the email thread in a few
just sent, lmk if it came through
Did you send it to alexrice@comcast.net
just resent that, when you get the chance lmk if it worked

Yes I got it, thanks! If we were to add on these packages, do we have to the same day we book hotel through you guys? Or can we add it later down the line. Will there be a difference in price if we wait?
are you talking about for the party package add on?
Yes and like the booze cruise
gotcha yea you dont have to add those on right this second, can add them later on. pricing will stay the same for those!
Liked “gotcha yea you dont have to add those on right this second, can add them later on. pricing will stay the same for those!”
Can you verify w me that the quotes for the 4 and 5 night Cancun trips haven't changed
Also, do you guys provide transportation to the clubs if we stay at the grand oasis? Or is that an upcharge
for the transportation theres a $1 trolly each way to get down to the party center. its about 5 miles down the road. comes by every 15 mins
looks like the grand oasis prices have gone up just a little bit since the initial quote
Liked “for the transportation theres a $1 trolly each way to get down to the party center. its about 5 miles down the road. comes by every 15 mins”
What is the new quote? the 4 night says $646 for me but can u lmk the new one

Ok cool!! That's all good. Sorru for the delay- people have been really busy w jobs over break. I'm kind of wondering though what are the benefits of booking through you guys? Bc we called the resort itself and they offered us the same price even the smallest bit cheaper. We kind of assumed going through an agency as a group would get us a discount. Are there benefits I'm not seeing? I know we get transportation to and from the airport which is nice but the resort offered us the trip from the airport to the resort meaning we'd only have to pay for one extra journey
yea all good. what was the package the resort gave you, did they put it in writing? price wise I can do what we can to match it + the transportation back from the airport will be included

but overall, we specialize in bookings for college groups, we'll have other college students part of our program rolling with you, our onsite staff will be there with you 24/7 if you ever need any help navigating the resort, help with check in, finding transportation, advice getting around the resort, communicating with hotel staff, etc. and you have me as your direct rep to text back and forth the way we have the last week and a half
you get a way more personalized trip, at, if not the same price, a better one
Amazing I'm pretty sure we're gonna go through you guys
Would u mind sending the new quote? For the 4 night stay at the grand oasis cancun
Also does the price include all taxes? American and Mexican ones?
My moms reading reviews about you right now and she loves u
dope! yea i can get you guys a reservation started, and yep no hidden fees or anything price you see is what you pay
Liked “dope! yea i can get you guys a reservation started, and yep no hidden fees or anything price you see is what you pay”
It may be 12 now. Did u send me the new quote? Also is there a difference in pricing for 2 people in a room vs 3 in a room vs 4 in a room
And the link for the optional travel protection does not work anymore. How much is that and what are the details
ok word, i just sent it over! should be in the same email thread
i'll grab you the link for the travel insurance, for that pricing varies state to state, we partner with a company called travel insured, so it is their pricing. I've seen it range from $75-$150
Ok how will I find exact price. And I dont see the email

Liked “i'll grab you the link for the travel insurance, for that pricing varies state to state, we partner with a company called travel insured, so it is their pricing. I've seen it range from $75-$150”
you just go through their process, and they'll give you a quote for the trip! like getting car insurance basically. and the email may of went to your spam, lmk if you cant find it i'll try resending!

Liked “you just go through their process, and they'll give you a quote for the trip! like getting car insurance basically. and the email may of went to your spam, lmk if you cant find it i'll try resending!”
I got it.. i'm not sure but it still says $646 for the 4 night
Also, the link for travel insurance still doesn't work
if the dates changed from march 27-march 31 how would that look
Sorry we are all over the place
try this link to check out the travel insured site https://www.travelinsured.com/agency/
How many people do buy insurance?
sorry i knocked out lol but i'd say its like 50/50, its def nice to have tho, never know what could pop up
Liked “sorry i knocked out lol but i'd say its like 50/50, its def nice to have tho, never know what could pop up”
Hey! Just want to confirm that if we went w 4 nights it would be $646 per person vs 5 nights at $799
did you want me to get that set up?
Would we have that wristband? To be able to go to everything?
And are there any restaurants we can't eat at? Or ones that charge extra
And is there a casino? Can we go for free
Btw I think we're gonna book the 5 nights march 28-april 2 through u guys
If you can, we're looking to book tonight so if you could answer those questions that would be great
hey sorry was offline for a bit

is that a review? not sure which other wristband they may have been referring to. you get the all inclusive wristband that has access to everything except 2-3 of the restaurants that come with the premium wristband

the premuim wristband is an upgrade you can get at the time of check in. its typically around $50 a day. its not worth it in my opinion. you get everything you need with the accommodation we have. but the option is there
there is a casino that comes with the accommodation. free
I can set you up with the March 28 - April 2nd package. we ready to roll?
Yes what would we need to give u tn
My parents are worried that spring break u may not be legit. Im still trying to find reviews online but literally cant find shit
did they want to hop on a call?
I'll send you the reservation in about 10mins btw. each of you hop on, join trip on an open slot, enter your own details and make your own payments
hey just a heads up my math was a little wrong, its $826.27 with the even split. is everyone cool with that?
just emailed over the res, if y'all have anymore questions just lmk
Yes! One girl is having to talk to her parents a little extra. We'll fill it out today though
sending to my friends right now
Ok hi I know you probably hate us lol bc we have millions of questions and keep saying we are booking but here is my final question

Basically, looking at funjet which is a different agency that books group trips, they are offering $768 per person for 11 people and that includes transportation. We really want to go through you guys and were wondering if you would match it
I can send the pictures right now

the first picture shows for 3 people and 5 nights for $2324.5 in total. And the second picture shows for 8 people and 5 nights plus the transportation (which would carry all of us since we got two vans and each carry 6 people) and that one is $6125.5 per person. Doing the math, that's $8450 in total and divide that by 11 people, is $768 per person. Your plan has us at $826 per person. Could this be matched?
these photos are a little blurry. cant really see much
what part do u need to see better
Sorry it's my moms old ass computer
the vans for transportation are per person too btw. they wont let you add more people into the van without them having their own paid slot in the van
so youd have to add transportation to the 3 person room separately as well
I'll go get link for you. But regarding transportation on funjet end, they said to us that each van can carry 6 so we only have to tack on two
This the transportation you referring to?
from what I see, its only valid per room. so youd have to add it twice to your reservation of 8, and youd have to add another for that separate reservation of 3
I would just make sure you get clarification on that. since its in bold, clicking through it here myself and makes me select it again for the other room. adds another $113 on top
looks like here its one single payment on one card for the full reservation as well. so everyones gonna have to pay someone back, venmos etc. and it all has to be paid up front. y'all cool with that?
One of the girls aunts works for funjet and she told us that we wouldn't have to add in another van and those two vans would be enough.
My friends are okay to use one card if need be- we're actually doing that with our flights.

Anyways, we really appreciate all the time you've put into helping us and so we are looking to book through you. We're just hoping we can get this price matched or maybe meet in the middle and pay $800 per person. People are just noticing that the difference between $786 and $826 is a solid $40 and $40 times 11 is a lot of money
yea all good. just refresh the reservation page should be all set
People should be filling it out right now
Since I have them it with literally only 30 mins to put it all in, would a deposit of $200 be okay tmrw morning?
We'll have our info in though
yoo Alex does Lucy plan on going on the trip?
shes the only one that hasnt deposited
hey any word on Lucy? Operations is about to remove her
So sorry! I've been on vacation
yoo Alex any word on Lucy?
Hi she can't anymore but this girl is taking her spot
But I got you, the girl that's taking her spot, is she ready to hop in?
she'll put her name in the thing tmrw morning f
Hey everyone should be in and paid fully. Do you see that on ur end? Also are there deadlines for add ons like party package/booze cruise

Oh and I doubt this will happen but if more girls wanted to join, what would that entail? Can they join our reservation? Would they pay the same rates? And if we hit 15 people, would we then get any perks?

Hey yea so you can add the party pass or booze cruise up to 2 days before the trip. And also we can add ppl to your reservation as long as we have availability. Pricing will depend on what it is at the time of adding them in
If we get to 15, I can hook you up with a free stay or we can spread the discount amongst the group
Hey Spiffy- just checking in to see if there is anything the girls and I need to do to get ready for the trip. Anything to fill out online etc
Yo whats up! y'all got your flight details entered in?
No we haven't yet. We have all our flights though. When should we enter that in by? Also does pricing for party pass or booze cruise increase as time goes on. Or is it a standard price
just as soon as possible. and pricing should stay the same through the week of your trip. but it could potentially change, like the price for coco bongo went up

Hey Spiffy! I'm sure you've been having a lot of groups reach out in response to all the stuff going on in Mexico. What is Spring BreakU thoughts on it so far? Are other groups canceling out of caution? What's your cancellation policy regarding this? Like if the US decides to prevent travel there. My group of course still wants to go, but if by our trip, it doesn't calm down, our parents surely won't let us go. Just let me know, thanks!

Hey Spiffy! I'm sure you've been having a lot of groups reach out in response to all the stuff going on in Mexico. What is Spring BreakU thoughts on it so far? Are other groups canceling out of caution? What's your cancellation policy regarding this? Like if the US decides to prevent travel there. If by the time of our trip, it doesn't calm down, our parents surely won't let us go. Just let me know, thanks!

Alex whats goooood. Yea totally get the concern. The stuff going around is tied to other parts of Mexico, not the Cancun hotel zone where our resorts are. Cancun tourism areas are heavily secured and operating normally at the moment
Since its all very fresh and new and with all of the media and propaganda out there we can only take it hour by hour to truly know whats up

We're not seeing groups canceling, def had many groups reach out the same way you have, but at the moment all trips are still running as scheduled. If the U.S. government were to officially restrict travel to Cancun, we'd immediately notify everyone and outline next steps
if you wanted to change your trip, I can def help you get a clean switch to Punta Cana where I'll be
Hey just an update, the U.S. Embassy lifted all restrictions for travel to Mexico, meaning everything is operating as normal

Hey so sorry for not getting back to you earlier - got super busy w Midterms. That is awesome news, thanks! As of right now, we are aren't going to make any changes to our travel plans. But definitely keep us in the loop and I'll reach out if we have any concerns. This weekend we are gonna sit down and entire our flights as well as talk about adding packages
If we decided later that we didn't feel comfortable with going to Cancun, what would the switch look like? Would we be guaranteed a spot to Punta Cana? Would it be more expensive? Less? The same?
Okay cool. and yea if you ever wanted to switch, were offering our travelers a discounted Punta Cana package at $400 per person. the resort is the Occidental Punta Cana
we'd have to make that switch soon though, availability is getting slim
Would we get our money back?
Unfortunately the reservation is locked and confirmed with Grand Oasis and the local vendors so if we do Punta Cana it would be an entirely new reservation
Liked “Unfortunately the reservation is locked and confirmed with Grand Oasis and the local vendors so if we do Punta Cana it would be an entirely new reservation”
Is there a reason why the website only asks for the confirmation code for one of my flights and not the others?
its all good, more so for the way there, so we can track and see if there are any delays while your on your way
for the way back, your shuttle time will be the same either way. on par with your departure time
that one we dont need to track the code
Wait yes but for my departure flight info it only asks for one code - I would have thought you'd need both for the flights arriving
gotcha yea we only need the code for your flight leaving Cancun. the second leg we wont be tracking
Leaving for it ? Or leaving to go home
I think we're confusing eachother lol
really, dont worry about it. as long as your flight times are correct, youre good
Loved “really, dont worry about it. as long as your flight times are correct, youre good”

Hiii question about the party package. I know u sent me the list of diff clubs/venues apart of the package but I was wondering if you could explain it a bit more to me. If we bought the 3 night one, would we be able to go to any and as many of the 7 clubs u listed each night? Can we only choose one each night? Do you guys provide transportation there and back? And do we get to pick which 3 of the nights?
this is the event lineup while youre out there SATURDAY, MARCH 28 - D'Cave SUNDAY, MARCH 29 - HOF MONDAY, MARCH 30 - La Vaquita TUESDAY, MARCH 31 - Mandala
if you get the 3 night party pass, you can choose 3 of those nights
for transportation theres a $1 troll that goes by the resort every 15mins. the nightclubs are 5 miles down the road. you catch that there and back with everyone
Ok cool! Could we do a 2 night one too?
Loved “for transportation theres a $1 troll that goes by the resort every 15mins. the nightclubs are 5 miles down the road. you catch that there and back with everyone”
Ur email from a while back has 2 night listed at $125 per person
It looks like I don't have the 2 night option anymore, just the 3 and up, and the booze cruise
hey did we wanna add any of those options?

Im talking it over w the girls. Bc I know we decided we wanted to go to Coco bongo, Dcave, and mandala so Im not sure if they are going to want to do the 3 night package w you guys. But I will lyk! And likely we will add the booze cruise - do yk how long it is? And is it a specific day
Oh got you. Coco bongo, D'Cave, and Mandala would be the 3 night pass so that would work
And the booze cruise is about a 2.5 hour open bar party boat type of vibe. Will be other groups on it with you. they schedule your day when you get there based on what space is available
Le encantó “And the booze cruise is about a 2.5 hour open bar party boat type of vibe. Will be other groups on it with you. they schedule your day when you get there based on what space is available”
You didn't list coco bongo above though??
coco bongo you can go to any night. its open every night
Hiii we're looking at diff excursions rn. What's the itinerary and what's included for the booze cruise? Does it stop at an island? Do we snorkel? Is there food?
Also do you have a contact for who is going to be with us in cancun bc Ik ur going to DR
How much is the 3 day party pass

hey heres the nightclub sched for your week SATURDAY, MARCH 28 - D'Cave SUNDAY, MARCH 29 - HOF MONDAY, MARCH 30 - La Vaquita TUESDAY, MARCH 31 - Mandala The booze cruise is pretty dope, it does stop by not on an island, more so a spot where youre able to get out in the water. it is open bar, typically no food on them. the day of your booze cruise will be assigned during your check in process
I thought u said we could go to coco bongo one night? Is that wrong

Liked “hey heres the nightclub sched for your week SATURDAY, MARCH 28 - D'Cave SUNDAY, MARCH 29 - HOF MONDAY, MARCH 30 - La Vaquita TUESDAY, MARCH 31 - Mandala The booze cruise is pretty dope, it does stop by not on an island, more so a spot where youre able to get out in the water. it is open bar, typically no food on them. the day of your booze cruise will be assigned during your check in process”
My bad I forgot to note that. Coco Bongo you can go to any night
It's an option any night of the week you're there
Ok is that the same for any other club?
And through you guys is it like unlimited drinks in there? skip the line? sorry for so many questions lol
And could u send the contact of who's gonna be w us in cancun
Yea cover charge, express entry, and open bar
Yea there's gonna be a full staff there of atleast 4-6 ppl
I'll send one of their numbers closer to the trip
hey hey. we just need Lily and Ella's flight info. are they on the same flight as anyone else in the group?
Hey! Were all on the same flights - but Ill have them add it right now, sorry!
okay all good I can add that in
Is there snorkeling on the booze cruise? And are the snorkels provided?
Questioned “Is there snorkeling on the booze cruise? And are the snorkels provided? ”
hey hey sorry I missed this
grabbing this info now, I know the standard booze cruise is an open bar party boat where youre able to get out into the water. but not necessarily a snorkeling cruise. from what I know

but there def is a snorkeling excursion option. Manuel who is our booze cruise rep on the ground will give you all of the details you need and options avail. the snorkeling option does provide snorkles
